name: SHORT EXPIRY- CLEARANCE: Enjoy Dog Treats - Lasagna Sandwich Biscuits 250g
description: Enjoy Dog Treats - Lasagna Sandwich Baked & Dried Biscuits , reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: cereals, meat & animal by-products, vegetable oils & fats, glucose 5.4%, milk and milk-by-products, minerals, vegetables. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 10.4 Oil Content (%) - 7.2 Crude Ash (%) - 3.1 Crude Fiber (%) - 3.3 Sodium (%) - 0.7 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Feed a maximum of 10 pieces per day. Recommended for all dogs. Feed as a snack or treat between meals. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Once open, keep the package tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
